---
title: "Python Quest Track"
subtitle: "Master Python Through Interactive Adventures"
track-id: "python"
track-icon: "🐍"
track-color: "#10b981"
difficulty: "Beginner"
total-quests: 19
estimated-hours: 20
format:
  live-html:
    toc: false
---

::: {.hero}
# 🐍 Welcome to the Python Quest Track!

*Master the most popular programming language through engaging, interactive quests!*
:::

## 🎯 About This Track

Python is the perfect first programming language — powerful, readable, and used everywhere from web development to artificial intelligence. This track takes you from absolute beginner to confident programmer through 19 carefully crafted quests.

### What You'll Master

- ✅ **Programming Fundamentals** - Variables, data types, control flow
- ✅ **Data Structures** - Lists, dictionaries, and how to use them
- ✅ **Functions & Modularity** - Write reusable, elegant code
- ✅ **Algorithms** - Sorting, searching, recursion, and complexity
- ✅ **Object-Oriented Programming** - Classes and design patterns
- ✅ **Real-World Problem Solving** - Build actual programs

### Prerequisites

::: {.callout-note}
## Before You Begin

**No programming experience required!** This track starts from scratch.

**Helpful (but not required):**
- Comfort using a computer
- Curiosity and willingness to experiment
- High school math (algebra level)

**Brand new to Computer Science?** [Start here](../../intro/what-is-cs.qmd)!
:::

---

## 🗺️ Your Learning Path

This track contains **19 quests** organized into progressive sections.

<div class="quest-grid">

::: {.quest-card}
### 📚 Foundation (Quests 1-8)
Master the core concepts

- Variables and data types
- Conditionals and loops
- Lists and dictionaries
- Functions basics
- Fibonacci sequences

**Estimated time:** 8 hours
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### 🎯 Practice (Quests 9-12)
Apply your knowledge

- Sorting algorithms
- Build a number game
- Recursion techniques
- Algorithm complexity

**Estimated time:** 6 hours
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### 🚀 Mastery (Quests 13-19)
Advanced techniques

- Advanced functions
- Lambda expressions
- Higher-order functions
- Decorators
- Object-oriented design

**Estimated time:** 6 hours
:::

</div>

---

## 🚀 Quick Start

Ready to begin your adventure? Choose your path:

::: {.highlight-box .highlight-info}
### Option 1: Start Quest 1 → (Recommended!)

Jump right in! Our interactive lessons let you code in your browser — no installation needed.

[Begin Quest 1: Variables →](lessons/01-variables.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: {.highlight-box .highlight-success}
### Option 2: Use JupyterLite

Full Python environment in your browser with all features.

[Launch JupyterLite →](interactive.qmd){.btn .btn-success}
:::

::: {.highlight-box .highlight-warning}
### Option 3: Explore All Quests

See the complete curriculum before starting.

[View All Python Quests →](all-quests.qmd){.btn .btn-warning}
:::

---

## 💻 Interactive Features

::: {.feature-grid}

::: {.feature-card}
### 🎮 In-Browser Execution
Code runs instantly using Pyodide. No setup required!
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### 📓 JupyterLite
Full Jupyter environment in browser for deeper practice
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### 📥 Downloadable Notebooks
Practice offline in local Jupyter or Google Colab
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### 🎯 Challenges & Solutions
Test your skills with guided exercises
:::

:::

---

## 🎓 Who Is This Track For?

::: {.audience-grid}

::: {.audience-card}
### 🌟 Complete Beginners
First time coding? Perfect! We assume zero experience.
:::

::: {.audience-card}
### 📚 Students
Supplement CS courses with interactive practice.
:::

::: {.audience-card}
### 💼 Career Switchers
Build foundational skills for tech careers.
:::

::: {.audience-card}
### 🔧 Hobbyists
Learn to automate tasks and build personal projects.
:::

:::

---

## 🏆 What You'll Build

By completing this track, you'll create:

1. **Type Converter** - Handle different data types
2. **Decision Maker** - Complex conditional logic
3. **List Processor** - Manipulate collections
4. **Function Library** - Reusable code modules
5. **Number Guessing Game** - Interactive program
6. **Sorting Algorithm** - Efficient data organization
7. **Fibonacci Calculator** - Mathematical sequences
8. **Recursion Solver** - Self-referencing problems
9. **Decorator System** - Function enhancement
10. **Class Hierarchy** - Object-oriented design

---

## 📚 Track Resources

::: {.resource-links}
- [📖 All Quests Overview](all-quests.qmd)
- [🚀 JupyterLite Environment](interactive.qmd)
- [📥 Download All Notebooks](../../files/python/lessons/)
- [🔧 Setup Local Python](setup.qmd)
- [❓ Python FAQ](faq.qmd)
:::

---

## 🎯 Learning Tips

::: {.tip-box}
### 💡 Make the Most of This Track

1. **Code along** - Type every example yourself (don't just read!)
2. **Experiment** - Try modifying code to see what happens
3. **Do challenges** - Attempt puzzles before checking solutions
4. **Practice daily** - Even 10 minutes helps build momentum
5. **Build projects** - Apply concepts to your own ideas
6. **Help others** - Teaching reinforces your understanding
:::

---

## 🗺️ After This Track

Once you complete the Python track, continue your journey:

::: {.next-steps}

### 🦀 Rust Track
Learn systems programming with Rust — build on Python foundations with performance-focused language.

[Explore Rust →](../rust/index.qmd)

---

### 🎮 Pygame Track
Apply your Python skills to game development! Create 7 complete games.

[Build Games →](../pygame/index.qmd)

---

### 📊 Data Science (Coming Soon!)
Use Python for data analysis, visualization, and machine learning.

:::

---

## 🤝 Community & Support

::: {.callout-tip}
## Need Help?

- 📧 [Email Support](mailto:obonhamcarter@allegheny.edu)
- 📖 [FAQ](faq.qmd) - Common questions answered
- 💬 [Discussion Forum](https://github.com/obonhamcarter/CS_Quest_Adventures/discussions)
- 🐛 [Report Issues](https://github.com/obonhamcarter/CS_Quest_Adventures/issues)
:::

---

## ➡️ Ready to Begin?

Your Python quest awaits! Click below to start your first adventure:

::: {.cta-large}
[🚀 Start Quest 1: Variables - Your Coding Backpack](lessons/01-variables.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}
:::

Or [view all quests →](all-quests.qmd) to see the complete learning path.

---

::: {.footer-note}
**About This Track**

Created by [Oliver Bonham-Carter](https://www.oliverbonhamcarter.com)  
Department of Computer and Information Science, Allegheny College  

Questions? [obonhamcarter@allegheny.edu](mailto:obonhamcarter@allegheny.edu)
:::
